dashboard.overview: Here's an overview of your vendor account.
dashboard.editProfileDesc: Edit your business details once. Changes become permanent after saving.
dashboard.onboardingIncomplete: Your onboarding is incomplete. Finish business details to publish your vendor profile.
dashboard.onboardingSetup: Set up your business profile, add service details, and submit for verification.
dashboard.manageServicesDesc: Add, edit, or remove services you offer to customers.
dashboard.viewBookingsDesc: Track and manage customer bookings and appointments.
dashboard.emailVerificationDesc: Please verify your email address to start receiving bookings. Check your inbox for a verification link or OTP.

bookings.title: Your Bookings
bookings.noBookingsDesc: When customers book your services, they'll appear here.
bookings.customerPaymentMessage: Customer has been asked to complete payment. OTP is sent after payment. Ask customer for OTP to verify completion.
bookings.workVerified: Work verified & completed! Customer has been notified.
bookings.paymentRequestSent: Payment request sent. OTP will be generated after customer payment.
bookings.cancellationReasonMin: Cancellation reason must be at least 5 characters

services.title: Your Services
services.noServicesDesc: Add your first service to start receiving bookings.
services.priceUpdateScheduled: Price update scheduled. It will go live in
services.serviceDeleted: Service deleted and added to history

editProfile.title: Edit Profile
editProfile.profileTimeout: Profile lookup timed out. Please continue onboarding and then revisit edit profile.
editProfile.needOnboarding: You need to complete your business onboarding before you can edit your profile. Set up your business details, location, and services first.
editProfile.profileLockedDesc: You have already used your one-time profile edit. Your details are now permanent. If you need further changes, please contact admin support.
editProfile.portfolioDesc: Upload up to 6 photos showcasing your work. These are shown on your public profile.
editProfile.oneTimeWarning: This is a one-time edit. Once saved, your profile details become permanent.
editProfile.incompleteOnboardingWarning: Your onboarding looks incomplete. You can finish the onboarding form first, then return here for one-time edits and portfolio updates.

login.title: Vendor Sign In
login.subtitle: Access your vendor dashboard
login.vendorOnly: This portal is for vendors only.
login.otpLoginFailed: OTP verified but login failed. Try email login.
login.sideDesc: Manage your services, track bookings, and grow your business — all from one dashboard.

register.title: Become a Vendor
register.subtitle: Create your vendor account and start offering services
register.passwordRule: Use 8+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.
register.phoneValidation: Phone number should be exactly 10 digits.
register.passwordRequirements: Password must be 8+ characters and include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
register.phoneRequirements: Phone number must be exactly 10 digits
register.sideDesc: Join thousands of verified service providers. Reach more customers and manage everything in one place.

onboarding.title: Set Up Your Service Area
onboarding.subtitle: Tell us where you operate so customers can find you.
onboarding.name: Name
onboarding.portfolioDesc: Upload up to 6 photos showcasing your work. These will be shown on your profile.
onboarding.selectCategory: Select at least one service category
onboarding.submitted: Onboarding submitted! Your profile is under review.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.stepEmail: Enter your registered email to receive a reset code.
forgotPassword.stepOtp: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.
forgotPassword.stepPassword: Create a new secure password for your account.
forgotPassword.passwordRule: Use 8+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.
forgotPassword.sideDesc: Secure password recovery for your vendor account.
forgotPassword.otpSent: Reset code sent! Check your email.
forgotPassword.passwordRequirements: Password must be 8+ characters and include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
forgotPassword.resetSuccess: Password reset successful! Please sign in.
